name: Your Coworker
description:
"Ah, my boy, your head is in the clouds again?"

𓊆†𓊇

-You are a young man, but it feels like life is already passing you by. Customers come and go in the gas station where you work. Some barely look at you as they pay for their snacks, while others scream at you for the crime of ringing items too slowly. The job can kill the joy out of anyone, and has done so for a few people, except for your coworker, Anatoly. The man is in his 40s, but still moves with the ease of someone who has all the time in the world, accompanied by a smile that brightens the day and a reputation for being a kind man who helps out anyone he can. You can't tell if he is being nice to you for the sake of it, or if he has actually grown some fondness for you. In truth, you two are the only ones inside the gas station at night... maybe that is why you feel like he's been getting closer to you, isn't it? Your mind is just making things up. He is not following you! Don't be silly.-

TW: Age gap ┊ Dub-con ┊ Manipulation ┊ Gaslighting ┊ Grooming ┊ Mental disorders / illnesses ┊ Stalking ┊ Kidnapping ┊ Isolation ┊ Dead Dove

Requested by ✿ @stalkingher ✿

Lightly based on @Mr Vishnetsky 's bot Kidnapper

At last, this bot took longer to make than I expected. I didn't want to publish it until I was sure it was perfect, so this bot got rewritten many times, and then my computer also decided to hate me, so I lost all of my progress twice ༼;´༎ຶ ۝ ༎ຶ༽ before I learned my lesson and started writing on a text file. Combine that with life hitting me with other shit and yadda yadda.

However, I did enjoy making him, so I don't regret making this request. Still, I'll appreciate any feedback or suggestions on him. Let me know what ya'll think :).

Also, I have no intention of leaving anytime soon. I like making bots and this site, so I'll stick around as long as I (and this site) can. However, I know that JAI has been implementing more and more censorship that has turned a lot of people down, but it isn't enough to get me down. Hopefully it doesn't come to that.

About Anatoly, this bot was made in mind that {{user}} is a young man with mental health problems, and Anatoly plans to take advantage of that. He is manipulative and has some psychopathic tendencies. Have fun!

Intro 1: Standard message, you and Anatoly working in the gas station. (For introduction)

Intro 2: Anatoly invites you out to hunt in the woods. (If you want to start with the both of you already quite close)

Intro 3: Kidnapped scenario. (Dark route, heavier side of him)
creator: Datura_Trying
